artifact: Lists leagues where average home goals exceed average away goals.
sql: SELECT l.name FROM Match AS m JOIN League AS l ON m.league_id = l.id WHERE m.season = '2009/2010' GROUP BY l.id, l.name HAVING SUM(m.home_team_goal)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) > SUM(m.away_team_goal)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT m.id);

raw_response.sql: SELECT l.name FROM Match AS m JOIN League AS l ON m.league_id = l.id WHERE m.season = '2009/2010' GROUP BY l.id, l.name HAVING SUM(m.home_team_goal)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) > SUM(m.away_team_goal)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT m.id);
raw_response.artifact: Lists leagues where average home goals exceed average away goals.
